class ClusterTerminationPolicy(builtins.str, enum.Enum):

The termination policy of cluster.

DONOTTERMINATE = <ClusterTerminationPolicy.DONOTTERMINATE: 'DoNotTerminate'>
HALT = <ClusterTerminationPolicy.HALT: 'Halt'>
DELETE = <ClusterTerminationPolicy.DELETE: 'Delete'>
WIPEOUT = <ClusterTerminationPolicy.WIPEOUT: 'WipeOut'>
class ClusterType(builtins.str, enum.Enum):

Describes the type of cluster, [Normal] normal cluster; [DisasterRecovery] disaster recovery cluster

NORMAL = <ClusterType.NORMAL: 'Normal'>

Environment( provider: str, region: str, availability_zones: List[str], display_name: str, id_: str, name: str, organizations: List[str], state: EnvironmentState, type_: EnvironmentType, provision_config: ProvisionConfig, created_at: datetime.datetime, updated_at: datetime.datetime, scheduling_config: Optional[SchedulingConfig] = None, network_config: Optional[NetworkConfig] = None, description: Optional[str] = None, metrics_monitor_enabled: Optional[bool] = None, autohealing_config: Optional[AutohealingConfig] = None, extra_info: Optional[str] = None, delete_policy: Optional[EnvironmentDeletePolicy] = None, cluster_validation_policy: Optional[ClusterValidationPolicy] = None, architecture: Optional[EnvironmentArchitecture] = None)

region: str
availability_zones: List[str]
display_name: str
id_: str
name: str
organizations: List[str]
state: EnvironmentState
type_: EnvironmentType
provision_config: ProvisionConfig
created_at: datetime.datetime
updated_at: datetime.datetime
scheduling_config: Optional[SchedulingConfig] = None
network_config: Optional[NetworkConfig] = None
description: Optional[str] = None
metrics_monitor_enabled: Optional[bool] = None
autohealing_config: Optional[AutohealingConfig] = None
extra_info: Optional[str] = None
delete_policy: Optional[EnvironmentDeletePolicy] = None
cluster_validation_policy: Optional[ClusterValidationPolicy] = None
architecture: Optional[EnvironmentArchitecture] = None

def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:

Serialize to a dict, omitting None values.

Architecture of the environment data plane nodes (arm64, amd64, or multiarch for multiple architectures)

AMD64 = <EnvironmentArchitecture.AMD64: 'amd64'>
MULTIARCH = <EnvironmentArchitecture.MULTIARCH: 'multiarch'>

class EnvironmentModuleAction(builtins.str, enum.Enum):

Action to perform on the environment module:

  • Enable: Enable the module
  • Disable: Disable the module
  • Upgrade: Upgrade the module to specified version
ENABLE = <EnvironmentModuleAction.ENABLE: 'Enable'>
DISABLE = <EnvironmentModuleAction.DISABLE: 'Disable'>
UPGRADE = <EnvironmentModuleAction.UPGRADE: 'Upgrade'>

@dataclass
class OutageRecord:

Records the outage events of a cluster for SLA calculation. It is designed to ensure that for any given cluster, there can be at most one active outage record at any time.

class ServiceDescriptorAddressStyle(builtins.str, enum.Enum):

specify the style that will be used in servicedescriptor. 'hostport' will ask user to provide both host and port. 'endpoint' will ask user to provide an endpoint. When using a serviceSelector,...

HOSTPORT = <ServiceDescriptorAddressStyle.HOSTPORT: 'hostport'>
ENDPOINT = <ServiceDescriptorAddressStyle.ENDPOINT: 'endpoint'>

class StorageClassReclaimPolicy(builtins.str, enum.Enum):

reclaimPolicy controls the reclaimPolicy for dynamically provisioned PersistentVolumes of this storage class. Defaults to Delete.

DELETE = <StorageClassReclaimPolicy.DELETE: 'Delete'>
RETAIN = <StorageClassReclaimPolicy.RETAIN: 'Retain'>
RECYCLE = <StorageClassReclaimPolicy.RECYCLE: 'Recycle'>

class StorageClassVolumeBindingMode(builtins.str, enum.Enum):

volumeBindingMode indicates how PersistentVolumeClaims should be provisioned and bound. Defaults to Immediate.

IMMEDIATE = <StorageClassVolumeBindingMode.IMMEDIATE: 'Immediate'>
WAITFORFIRSTCONSUMER = <StorageClassVolumeBindingMode.WAITFORFIRSTCONSUMER: 'WaitForFirstConsumer'>
